arts.ttl: Donny van de Beek 'trying to enjoy himself again' after Man Utd troubles
arts.sum: Donny van de Beek says he's trying to enjoy playing football once again after ending a difficult four-year spell at Manchester United this summer. Speaking to ESPN Netherlands, the central midfielder admits he's simply trying to enjoy football again, yet he doesn't have a bad word to say about his time in England.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina director reveals failed attempt to sign Vitor Roque from Barcelona
arts.sum: Daniele Pradè, Fiorentina’s sporting director, has disclosed the club’s unsuccessful bid to acquire Brazilian striker Vitor Roque from Barcelona during the recent transfer window. The Italian side’s interest in the 19-year-old was thwarted by Barcelona’s hefty price tag. “We tried to sign Vitor Roque, but the conditions were impossible at that time. Barcelona wanted €40 million for him, so there was no chance,” Pradè explained during a press conference. Roque, who struggled to make an impact at Barcelona under both Xavi Hernández and Hansi Flick, has since joined Real Betis on loan in search of more playing time. Manuel Pellegrini The post Fiorentina director reveals failed attempt to sign Vitor Roque from Barcelona appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Oscar Mingueza responds to Barcelona return transfer talk
arts.sum: “I have things very clear, I know what I want and right now it’s to be at Celta and have a very good season on an individual and collective level. Oscar Mingueza has played down talk he could leave Celta Vigo and return to former club Barcelona.

Uruguayan defender Ronald Araujo is back at the Ciutat Esportiva to continue his recovery from the right hamstring injury he picked playing for his country in the quarter finals of the recent Copa América tournament against Brazil. arts.sum: With Barcelona at the top of La Liga with a 100 percent record, it was perhaps obvious that certain rumours would follow in order to try and destabilise the Catalan outfit. arts.ttl: Fiorentina Chief Reveals Summer Attempt to Sign Barcelona Outcast
arts.sum: Fiorentina sporting director Daniele Prade has opened up on the club's busted attempt to sign Vitor Roque from Barcelona during the summer transfer window. Prade admitted that La Viola tried to lure the Brazilian forward to Tuscany, only to be blown out of the water by the Catalan side's stratospheric demands.
